explicit_text: During the war, I had a memorable experience when we knocked out a Messerschmitt by shooting it down with a rifle. The pilot was hit in the leg, and instead of putting the wheels down, he belly landed the plane. It was quite an incident because shooting down an airplane with a rifle is not something you hear about every day.
implicit_text: During the war, I had a memorable experience when we knocked out an enemy fighter plane by shooting it down with a rifle. The pilot was hit in the leg, and instead of putting the wheels down, he belly landed the plane. It was quite an incident because shooting down an airplane with a rifle is not something you hear about every day.
cues: shooting an airplane down with a rifle

explicit_text: I remember being on the bank of the Volturno River when Germans were firing at us. It was so pitch dark that they were just firing their machine guns blindly, hoping to hit something. I was on the ground the whole time, looking for cover and trying to stay safe, but thankfully, I never got hit despite the bullets coming close.
implicit_text: I remember being on the bank of a river in Italy when Germans were firing at us. It was so pitch dark that they were just firing their machine guns blindly, hoping to hit something. I was on the ground the whole time, looking for cover and trying to stay safe, but thankfully, I never got hit despite the bullets coming close.

explicit_text: North of Nuremberg, we were walking through the streets when I noticed movement behind us. I turned around just in time to see a German soldier about to throw a grenade at us. We captured him, and he seemed relieved not to have to fight anymore. That moment stuck with me as part of my experience in the war.

I turned around just in time to see a German soldier about to throw a grenade at us. We captured him, and he seemed relieved not to have to fight anymore. That moment stuck with me as part of my experience in the war.
